title: Elegant Pistachio Floral Art Cake
description: Beautiful pistachio-flavoured cake featuring textured gold detailing, delicate line-art design, pastel rosettes, pearl borders, and handcrafted floral decorations—perfect for elegant celebrations.
ingredients: Pistachio sponge, pistachio buttercream, edible gold detailing, buttercream rosettes, decorative flowers, sugar pearls
